title: Poor Feeding
clinical_tip: Febrile infant — sepsis workup, fluids, and close monitoring before disposition.
objective: Stabilize the pediatric patient and complete emergent workup before disposition.
exam: Not feeding well. Looks tired and fussy when touched.
Breathing quick. Getting enough air but working hard.
Belly soft. Not screaming when you press.
Awake but not acting normal. Hard to settle.
Hot to touch. No rash that I can see.
historyText: Parent brought infant in for poor feeding and fever. Feeding has dropped off over the last day. More sleepy than usual.
